expectations.text: Recommends extraction of data fetching from rendering concern
expectations.evidence: Section 1: 'Extract data fetching into a custom hook' with useDashboardData implementation. Section 2: 'Extract data transformation into a pure function.' Section 3: 'Keep the component as a thin composition layer.'

expectations.text: Does NOT blindly recommend extracting everything -- applies judgment about when extraction adds unnecessary layers
expectations.evidence: 'What Not To Do' section: 'Do not create a generic useFetch hook unless you have three or more components.' 'Do not split purely for line count. The split is justified here because there are three distinct responsibilities.'

expectations.text: Any new files or functions use named exports
expectations.evidence: Code examples show plain function declarations without export keywords: 'function useDashboardData(params)', 'function transformDashboardData(raw)', 'function Dashboard({ params })'. No exports demonstrated. The with-skill version explicitly uses 'export function' on all examples.
